title: pisum latifolium
intro: Pisum latifolium, also known as garden pea, is a leguminous plant belonging to the family Fabaceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as providing relief from symptoms of menopause and insomnia. Pisum latifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
